purpose: Compact audit of superRA agent load and handoff contracts for future CI-safe fixture tests and manual live harness smokes.

check_classes.ci_safe_static: Parse committed source files or generated files. No model call.
check_classes.ci_safe_fixture: Run deterministic local CLI or hook fixture. No model call.
check_classes.manual_live_claude: Requires a Claude live transcript/tool-event run.
check_classes.manual_live_codex: Requires a Codex live transcript/tool-event run.
check_classes.manual_live_both: Requires live transcript/tool-event runs in both Claude and Codex.

entries.trigger: Any superRA dispatch or direct-mode role session.
expected_evidence: source manifest names superRA:using-superra and superRA:report-in-markdown as always loaded
role frontmatter lists those skills
live transcript shows the role loads/reads both before task file or code edits

fixture_unit: test_always_loaded_live.py (introspection + codex canary evaluators on synthetic inputs)
manual_live_claude: always_loaded_live.py (autoload introspection canary; zero Skill-tool loads is the expected signal)
manual_live_codex: always-loaded-codex-smoke.sh + check_always_loaded_smoke.py (body-load canary; built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Claude live-verified (both always-loaded skills present via frontmatter autoload). Codex live not yet run.

entries.trigger: Dispatch includes Stage: planning-review, implementation, protection, sync, integration, or maturation.
expected_evidence: structured table parse finds the stage rows and load targets
live transcript for non-empty stage rows shows the target skill(s)/reference loaded before action
the maturation row loads task-tree + superplan (writing conditional, prose-heavy maturation only)
the implementation row produces no extra stage-skill expectation

fixture_unit: test_stage_loads_live.py (stage evaluator + per-stage codex canaries on synthetic inputs)
manual_live_claude: stage_loads_live.py (per-stage Skill-tool + planning-review Read-channel canary; maturation as a multi-skill Skill-tool stage)
manual_live_codex: stage_loads_live.py per-stage CanarySpec (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Claude live-verified for the four single-target non-empty stages. See LC007-LC010 for per-stage detail and LC023 for the maturation multi-skill stage (added on the trunk sync, fixture-covered, live-pending). Codex live not yet run.

entries.trigger: Task content touches data analysis, mathematical modeling, writing/prose, or slide-design work.
expected_evidence: structured table parse finds the four domain rows
fixture prompts can include unambiguous task text for each domain
live transcript shows every matching domain skill loaded, including multiple matches when applicable

fixture_unit: test_domain_loads_live.py (domain evaluator + multi-domain every-match + per-domain codex canaries on synthetic inputs)
manual_live_claude: domain_loads_live.py (per-domain Skill-tool canary + multi-domain every-match canary)
manual_live_codex: domain_loads_live.py per-domain CanarySpec list (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Claude live-verified for all four domains plus the multi-domain every-match rule. See LC011-LC014 for per-domain detail. Codex live not yet run.

entries.trigger: A loaded superRA instruction names Claude-oriented tools or Codex is the active harness.
expected_evidence: structured table parse verifies the Codex tool map
Codex live transcript uses request_user_input/update_plan/spawn_agent/send_input equivalents where applicable

manual_live_codex: codex-live-smoke.sh + orchestrator-live-smoke.sh HARNESS=codex (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Codex-only live row; not yet run. Static coverage parses the Codex tool map as structured data.

entries.trigger: Implementer or reviewer receives Task: or Tasks: in a dispatch, or enters direct mode for one task.
expected_evidence: fixture parser rejects code or artifact edits that precede superra task read <path>
live transcript shows superra task read <path> before code or artifact edits

manual_live_claude: claude-live-smoke.sh + check_loading_smoke.py (superra task read before first edit)
manual_live_codex: codex-live-smoke.sh + check_loading_smoke.py (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Claude live-verified via the loading smoke ordering assertion. Codex live not yet run.

entries.trigger: Canonical role specs change, or generated role surfaces are checked.
expected_evidence: static drift check regenerates the .codex agent TOML into a temp tree and compares bytes
generated headers retain source and regeneration notice

covered_by.notes: Fully CI-covered; no live row by design.

entries.trigger: Reviewer dispatch has Stage: planning-review.
expected_evidence: structured table parse confirms planning-review maps to skills/superplan/references/planning-review.md
live reviewer transcript shows the reference loaded and planning-review protocol used instead of implementation diff review
no task status change occurs in planning-review

fixture_unit: test_stage_loads_live.py (Read-channel reference suffix matcher; stage evaluator green/red)
manual_live_claude: stage_loads_live.py STAGE_ROWS[planning-review] (reference loaded via Read; introspection canary)
manual_live_codex: stage_loads_live.py planning-review CanarySpec (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Claude live-verified: planning-review reads its reference (Read channel, not the Skill tool). Codex live not yet run.

entries.trigger: Dispatch has Stage: protection.
expected_evidence: structured table parse confirms the manifest maps protection to result-protection
static parse confirms drift/regression reference routing for the active mechanism
live transcript shows result-protection loaded before writing or reviewing protection tests

manual_live_codex: stage_loads_live.py protection CanarySpec (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Claude live-verified: protection loads result-protection. Codex live not yet run.

entries.trigger: Dispatch has Stage: sync, or semantic-merge is invoked directly.
expected_evidence: structured table parse confirms the manifest maps sync to semantic-merge
static parse confirms exactly one mode reference is selected by call path
live workflow-sync transcript shows workflow-sync author/reviewer reference selection

manual_live_codex: stage_loads_live.py sync CanarySpec (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Claude live-verified: sync loads semantic-merge. The author/reviewer mode-reference sub-selection is static-only, not separately live-asserted. Codex live not yet run.

entries.trigger: Dispatch has Stage: integration.
expected_evidence: structured table parse confirms the manifest maps integration to refactor-and-integrate
static parse confirms active domain skill may add integration references
live transcript or task Results records Final Diff Self-Check when integration work runs

manual_live_codex: stage_loads_live.py integration CanarySpec (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Claude live-verified: integration loads refactor-and-integrate. Codex live not yet run.

entries.trigger: Dispatch has Stage: maturation.
expected_evidence: structured table parse confirms the manifest maps maturation to task-tree, superplan, and writing
live transcript shows task-tree and superplan loaded before action; writing is not a guaranteed load
the over-load check treats task-tree and superplan as stage skills (a maturation skill on the negative implementation stage is an over-load)

fixture_unit: test_stage_loads_live.py (multi-skill stage evaluator: both guaranteed skills required, writing conditional; maturation codex canary)
manual_live_claude: stage_loads_live.py STAGE_ROWS[maturation] (task-tree + superplan via Skill tool; multi-skill positive stage)
manual_live_codex: stage_loads_live.py maturation CanarySpec (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Added on the better-handoff trunk sync (commit 929dad65 renamed documentation -> maturation and made it a positive multi-skill stage). Fixture-covered; live run pending for both harnesses.

entries.trigger: Task imports, cleans, merges, filters, constructs variables, aggregates, summarizes, regresses, or figures economic/financial/panel data.
expected_evidence: structured table parse confirms the domain is present in the manifest
fixture task with data wording should lead transcript to load econ-data-analysis
if implementation edits notebooks/scripts, transcript or output shows relevant implementer reference use

manual_live_codex: domain_loads_live.py econ-data-analysis CanarySpec (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Claude live-verified: data-wording task loads econ-data-analysis. Codex live not yet run.

entries.trigger: Task derives, solves, verifies, or proves mathematical/modeling content.
expected_evidence: structured table parse confirms the domain is present in the manifest
fixture task with proof/derivation wording should lead transcript to load theory-modeling
integration/protection stage tests account for terminology finding SF002

fixture_unit: test_domain_loads_live.py (domain evaluator + theory codex canary + multi-domain every-match case)
manual_live_claude: domain_loads_live.py DOMAIN_ROWS[theory-modeling] + multi-domain (theory-modeling + writing) every-match canary
manual_live_codex: domain_loads_live.py theory-modeling CanarySpec + multi-domain list canary (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Claude live-verified: derivation task loads theory-modeling, and the multi-domain every-match rule loads both theory-modeling and writing. Codex live not yet run.

entries.trigger: Task drafts, polishes, proofreads, reviews, or otherwise edits reader-facing .md/.tex prose.
expected_evidence: structured table parse confirms the domain is present in the manifest
fixture Markdown/prose task should lead transcript to load writing
reference loads depend on Review/Polish/Draft classification rather than all files at once

fixture_unit: test_domain_loads_live.py (domain evaluator + writing codex canary + multi-domain every-match case)
manual_live_claude: domain_loads_live.py DOMAIN_ROWS[writing] + multi-domain (theory-modeling + writing) every-match canary
manual_live_codex: domain_loads_live.py writing CanarySpec + multi-domain list canary (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Claude live-verified: prose task loads writing, including as a member of the multi-domain every-match set. Review/Polish/Draft sub-reference routing is static-only. Codex live not yet run.

entries.trigger: Task designs, reviews, creates, revises, or fixes research slides or Beamer source.
expected_evidence: structured table parse confirms the domain is present in the manifest
fixture slide/Beamer task should lead transcript to load slide-design
Beamer fixture should show applicable Beamer/layout reference or script use

manual_live_codex: domain_loads_live.py slide-design CanarySpec (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Claude live-verified: slide/Beamer task loads slide-design. Beamer sub-reference routing is static-only. Codex live not yet run.

entries.trigger: Agent or test runs superra task read <path>.
expected_evidence: CI fixture output contains focused context and each ancestor full Objective with nested Context/Conventions/Constraints
JSON fixture output has ancestors[].objective and ancestors[].sections
manual transcript shows agent consumed inherited context before editing

manual_live_claude: claude-live-smoke.sh + check_loading_smoke.py (agent consumes inherited context before the artifact write)
manual_live_codex: codex-live-smoke.sh + check_loading_smoke.py (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Ancestor-context surfacing is fully fixture-covered (deterministic). Live consumption is proxied by the loading smoke ordering, Claude-verified. Codex live not yet run.

entries.trigger: Target task has unresolved comments.yaml sidecar entries.
expected_evidence: CI fixture output surfaces unresolved comments with full anchored block, preview/body, orphaned flag, and degraded sentinel when applicable
resolved comments are absent
manual transcript shows agent notices surfaced comments when task read includes them

manual_live_claude: claude-live-smoke.sh (comment surfacing reachable via the bundled task read; no separate live assertion that the agent acts on the comment)
manual_live_codex: codex-live-smoke.sh (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Comment surfacing is fully fixture-covered. Whether the agent acts on a surfaced comment is not separately live-asserted (proxy via the loading smoke only).

entries.trigger: Target task has depends_on entries naming sibling tasks.
expected_evidence: CI fixture human output contains Sibling Dependencies with slug, effective status, and title
CI fixture JSON output contains dependencies[] with status and effective_status
missing sibling dependencies surface as NOT FOUND

ci_safe_fixture: test_bundle_fixture.py (Sibling Dependencies block + JSON dependencies[] with effective_status)
covered_by.notes: Fully fixture-covered; no live row by design.

entries.trigger: A target task depends on a sibling whose Results section contains sentinel text.
expected_evidence: CI fixture task-read output includes dependency status metadata but not dependency Results sentinel text
manual downstream dispatch includes explicit steering or objective text if dependency Results must be read

ci_safe_fixture: test_bundle_fixture.py (dependency Results sentinel never leaks into target context)
manual_live_claude: claude-live-smoke.sh + check_loading_smoke.py (artifact asserts dependency_results_excluded sentinel absent)
manual_live_codex: codex-live-smoke.sh + check_loading_smoke.py (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Non-inheritance is fully fixture-covered and additionally checked by the live loading smoke artifact field. Claude-verified; Codex live not yet run.

entries.trigger: Plugin hook manifests are installed or task.md / markdown files are edited through harness tools.
expected_evidence: CI static check parses hook registries under hooks/ and confirms UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, and Codex Stop where expected
CI hook fixtures invoke task-hook wrapper for Edit|Write/apply_patch and Bash matchers
manual live transcript can confirm PostToolUse hook feedback when task-hook emits feedback

manual_live_claude: not separately asserted live — PostToolUse hook feedback is observable only when task-hook emits; covered by registry-wiring static checks
manual_live_codex: Codex Bash hook coverage is best-effort (SF003); live tests do not depend on catching every shell mutation
covered_by.notes: Registry wiring is fully CI-covered. Live PostToolUse feedback is not separately asserted (static-only by design per SF003); not a coverage gap in the load contract.

entries.trigger: User invokes superimplement or implementation workflow over a task tree.
expected_evidence: fixture parser detects implementer and reviewer dispatches or a documented direct-mode fallback
manual live transcript shows main agent loads superimplement and agent-orchestration, dispatches implementer then reviewer for non-trivial work
manual live transcript documents direct-mode fallback only when allowed

manual_live_claude: orchestrator-live-smoke.sh + check_orchestrator_smoke.py (implementer then reviewer dispatch via Task/Agent events, or documented direct-mode fallback) — built/CI-tested; live run not part of the 08-12 expansion
manual_live_codex: orchestrator-live-smoke.sh HARNESS=codex + subagent_start_hook.py dispatch log (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Orchestrator dispatch smoke is built and its parser/fixtures are CI-covered. The Claude live orchestrator run was not part of the 08-12 always-loaded/stage/domain live verification; Codex live not yet run.

entries.trigger: Orchestrator dispatches implementer/reviewer or bundle, or handles status transitions.
expected_evidence: fixture parser detects structural implementer and reviewer dispatch events
manual live transcript shows Task: or Tasks:, Stage:, Git range for reviewer, and no aggregate bundle verdict
manual live transcript shows status-driven progression from implemented to reviewer and approved to next task

manual_live_claude: orchestrator-live-smoke.sh + check_orchestrator_smoke.py — built/CI-tested; live run not part of the 08-12 expansion
manual_live_codex: orchestrator-live-smoke.sh HARNESS=codex + subagent_start_hook.py dispatch log (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Dispatch detection is fixture-covered. Dispatch fields and status progression are asserted by the orchestrator smoke (built, live run pending for both harnesses).

entries.trigger: Codex main agent dispatches role agents in a superRA workflow.
expected_evidence: structured table parse confirms the named implementer and reviewer agent mappings
manual Codex transcript shows spawn_agent agent_type superra_implementer/superra_reviewer or documented fallback

manual_live_codex: orchestrator-live-smoke.sh HARNESS=codex + subagent_start_hook.py dispatch log (built/CI-tested, live-pending — no credentials yet)
covered_by.notes: Codex-only live row; the SubagentStart dispatch log supersedes JSONL spawn detection (codex emits no spawn_agent item). Not yet run.

static_findings.finding: The task objective names hook registries as hooks.json and hooks-codex.json, while committed registries live under hooks/hooks.json and hooks/hooks-codex.json.
static_findings.test_implication: Tests should target the actual hooks/ paths and may add a static docs lint if future prose uses root-level paths ambiguously.

static_findings.finding: Current manifest uses Stage: protection, but several references still use drift-test as a stage name or parenthetical synonym.
static_findings.test_implication: Treat as static terminology lint/follow-up. Live harness tests should assert protection from the manifest, not drift-test behavior.

static_findings.finding: Codex Bash hook coverage is documented as best-effort rather than a complete enforcement boundary.
static_findings.test_implication: Keep Codex Bash hook assertions to registry wiring and fixture invocation. Do not make manual live tests depend on catching every shell mutation.

static_findings.finding: Direct-mode exceptions are policy choices observable in transcripts only when the main agent states the fallback reason or dispatch path.
static_findings.test_implication: Manual live tests should accept either subagent dispatch evidence or explicit allowed fallback evidence, not infer fallback from absence of spawn events alone.
